commands.review_summary:
The PR changes shared and OpenAI Responses stream finalizers to throw an existing output.errorMessage before falling back to the generic stream error, and adds shared-helper regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: call finalizeTransportStream with stopReason "error" and a populated errorMessage, or reach either Responses finalizer after output.stopReason becomes "error" with an errorMessage; current main throws the generic message and overwrites the provider detail. I did not run a local test because this review is read-only.
